name: carmax / Auto workflow 686
task: Calculate the monthly payment of a 15k car with a down payment of 5k in Michigan for a fair-rated person for a term length of 48 months, then shop with this budget for the cheapest car and add it to the favorites.
goal_pattern: Calculate the monthly payment of a 15k car with a down payment of 5k in Michigan for a fair-rated person for a term length of 48 months, then shop with this budget for the cheapest car and add it to the favorites.

applicability.when_to_use: Use for tasks with a similar goal on the same site area.
applicability.when_not_to_use: Do not use if the current task asks for a different flow or page area.

steps.selection_rule: Choose the current visible candidate whose label, role, or nearby text best matches the target description.
steps.success_signal: The page advances or the selected field reflects the intended value.
